title: Signalling support for NR positioning with aperiodic SRS configurations
abstract: Embodiments described herein relate to methods and apparatus in networks, and particularly methods, Location Management Functions, base stations and wireless devices for configuring and sending uplink sounding reference signals (UL SRS). An example method performed by a Location Management Function (LMF) comprises receiving radio resource information relating to radio resources that can be applied for UL SRS by a wireless device; and providing a notification relating to triggering aperiodic uplink SRS to a base station serving the wireless device.
claims: 1. A method for configuring uplink sounding reference signals (UL SRS), the method comprising: receiving radio resource information relating to radio resources that can be applied for UL SRS by a wireless device, wherein the radio resource information is received from the base station serving the wireless device and comprises Downlink Control Indicator (DCI) code points; and providing, to a base station serving the wireless device, a notification relating to triggering aperiodic UL SRS for the wireless device, wherein the notification relating to triggering aperiodic uplink SRS comprises preferred DCI code points associated with uplink SRS configurations.
